name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: Tens of thousands of reasons to be hopeful
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6c38/24c69fd9/173d79f5a/189f6ca5/1218068400/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEK07N_digital_email_20171102_BestPlaceInPolitics_inact&source=WQEFEK07N_digital_email_20171102_BestPlaceInPolitics_inact")
---

Peter,

You know how when you have the flu, chicken noodle soup is _just_ what you need?

That's how I feel about EMILY's List. When the news cycle makes politics seem bleak, EMILY's List recharges me. I am excited to come to the office every single day.

With every new endorsement, every person who reaches into their wallet to give what they can, every new woman who tells us she's ready to put her name on the ballot, and every day we get closer to Election Day 2017 -- it's impossible NOT to get fired up.

**[If you're fired up too, donate $3 to help keep our work going to elect more pro-choice Democratic women across the country.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6c38/24c69fd9/173d79f5a/189f6ca6/1218068400/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171102_email_BestPlace?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+If+youre+fired+up+too+donate+3+to+help+k&utm_campaign=WQEFEK07N_digital_email_20171102_BestPlaceInPolitics_inact&source=WQEFEK07N_digital_email_20171102_BestPlaceInPolitics_inact") **

And I know I'm not the only one who feels this way. On Saturday, our president, Stephanie Schriock, announced at the Women's Convention that over 20,000 women have now reached out to us in the last year about running for office. The reaction was **thunderous.**

While Stephanie was in Detroit, I had the pleasure of being in New York City for a Run to Win training for more than 200 women. It. was. electrifying. I wish I could have bottled the energy in that room for you!

The thing is: for every time Trump tweets something disheartening, for every time you read a headline that fills you with dread, for every time you just want to scream with rage because of another vote in Congress -- EMILY's List has tens of thousands of reasons to be hopeful.

Whether that hope materializes into wins though depends on you.

**Donate $3 if you believe in our mission and want to help our women launch strong campaigns and win at the ballot box:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Just-What-You-Need](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6c38/24c69fd9/173d79f5a/189f6ca7/1218068400/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171102_email_BestPlace?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgJustWhatYouNeed&utm_campaign=WQEFEK07N_digital_email_20171102_BestPlaceInPolitics_inact&source=WQEFEK07N_digital_email_20171102_BestPlaceInPolitics_inact")**

Thank you -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

---

Peter,

The deranged animal who terrorized New York City came into our country through the "Diversity Visa Lottery" \-- a _politically correct_ government program that selects new immigrants at random with no other purpose than to fill quotas.

We can no longer sacrifice our sanity and our security at the altar of political correctness.

President Trump is demanding that Congress immediately end the "Diversity Visa Lottery" in favor of a MERIT-BASED immigration system where the interests of America are put FIRST.

Now he needs you to join the call to end this backwards program.

---
| **\- OFFICIAL PETITION W.H. 4540 -** **OBJECTIVE:** END THE DIVERSITY VISA LOTTERY
**Voter:** Peter Willis **SIGNATURE:** **N/A** [ **ADD YOUR NAME**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ae080813a18d06245822c9563c0b48529a431497c13c16d74802a2168434d974416a26dda837d2a117d7d35cf5b9aab5)

Peter, the fake news media is going to unleash a flurry of attacks against this petition. Which is why the President truly needs your support.

You and the President know this petition is common sense. We, as a country, have an absolute right to determine who can and cannot cross our borders -- and NO ONE can strip us of that right.

Coming to America as a legal immigrant is the greatest privilege in the world, and American citizenship cannot and will not be granted by some politically correct lottery.

It's time for change.

**[Please add your name to our Petition W.H. 4540 calling for Congress to immediately end the Diversity Visa Lottery.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ae080813a18d062412cac23b73e7073f22951ebf7ad2c30e618d8b399f62cb16acc66f291f91ed98d6ef7501009c7b2c)**

name: The White House
subject: Tax Reform Means a Better Tomorrow for All Americans
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5b9b37167e91bd91e8ccc0599ef0c25e9009d805f26b181988a3c11d2e646befbb362f522cfec47c1a4bdbb94d07838379a67befe041bd55

President Trump's goals have been the same since day one: bring tax cuts for hardworking, middle-income Americans; eliminate unfair loopholes and deductions; and slash business taxes so employers can create jobs, raise wages, and dominate their competition around the world.

----------------

House Republicans Release Historic Tax Plan

Yesterday, President Trump met with members of the House Committee on Ways and Means at the White House to discuss the newly unveiled Tax Cuts and Jobs Act. The plan lowers individual tax rates for low- and middle-income Americans, eliminates special-interest deductions, and repeals the death tax and Alternative Minimum Tax. “It’s tax cuts, it’s tax reform, and we added the word ‘jobs’ because it’s all about jobs,” said President Trump. “We’re going to have tremendous numbers of jobs pouring in.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5b9b37167e91bd91ac341cafd3d329e2cc979e5892edb01ba31ae6d1e1c79a1926f6bba04d9f9513c7373dddc1869b35a700723358c6038a
Read President Trump's statement on the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act and
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5b9b37167e91bd914bc2e2ee8c1ea6ff6e4ac53e9b425f14e4e49cc07ca6141326cd0341d5d2f3ea0bdef0dc45917bfc23ade634c0108a8a
sign your name to support tax reform.

Bringing Jobs Home to America

In the Oval Office yesterday, President Trump announced that Fortune 100 tech company Broadcom Limited is moving its headquarters to the United States. The company is currently based in Singapore and employs over 7,500 American workers. Hock Tan, CEO of Broadcom Limited, said the decision to relocate Broadcam was driven by his “desire to give back to this country that has given me so much." The move will bring more than $20 billion in annual revenue back to the U.S.

"My administration is working every day to make the United States the most attractive place in the world to do business," said President Trump, “so that more and more companies like Broadcom come back to our shores, grow their businesses, and create more and more American jobs. And you see that happening on a daily basis.”

See the full announcement
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5b9b37167e91bd911be0172f0239ee57271b236f5057ac15a08d46e5d64f7e3eaa8b9a7f89b1379ebaac81ab7ae11d0d65c1caa18a5de8f3
here .

President Trump Announces Fed Chair Nominee

On Thursday afternoon in the Rose Garden, President Trump announced his nomination of Governor Jerome (“Jay”) H. Powell as Chairman of the Federal Reserve. Governor Powell was selected by the President because of his professional experience, commitment to sound monetary and financial policy, and strong record of independent judgement.

Governor Powell has been a Federal Reserve board member since 2012 and has built a reputation as an effective and well-respected policymaker who has the judgment and experience necessary to lead the Federal Reserve. He previously served as Undersecretary of the Treasury under President George H.W. Bush.

See more from the announcement
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5b9b37167e91bd916f0af001025bd6fbfc612040de660422ed578c913464670425df6d1482b275d00d0cef30021a2265cd53f9069aae2821
here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump announced the nomination of Jerome Powell to be Chairman of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System | November 2, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump departs for Hawaii, where he will participate in a United States Pacific Command briefing. Afterwards, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump will participate in a tour of the USS Arizona Memorial. This is the President’s first stop before traveling to Asia for his longest foreign trip since taking office. During this trip, he will strengthen international resolve to de-nuclearize North Korea, promote a free and open Indo-Pacific, and advance American prosperity.

Vice President Mike Pence will travel to Maryland to visit the United States Secret Service Training Center.

COMING UP

This weekend, President Trump will depart Hawaii en route to Japan where he will meet with Emperor Akihito and Empress Michiko and conduct working meetings with Prime Minister Shinzō Abe and other Japanese leaders to reaffirm that America stands with Japan against the North Korea nuclear threat. Next week, the President will be visiting South Korea, China, Vietnam, and the Philippines.

Tomorrow, Vice President Pence will travel to York, Pennsylvania, to speak with local families and businesses about the need for tax reform.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5b9b37167e91bd916de443afb27093d6ee106aebe3b8fe834f64a39efb009130d38cf934027dff817205e37a45a6757cdb952b2d23795187

Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4f41d935a47d79e183f107ac4be49ec752a668c033b250e8e6817d92565f1d5881939036e5c713e1dbbde3716102a5dde

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Stepping up next week is just too late
body:
Step up before November 7th. **Pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats win in all 50 states.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523965/4067b0a/47d5f121f/7e66ef55/1583851500/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171103_tm2_nd&source=em_20171103_tm2_nd&refcode=em_20171103_tm2_nd")**

Derek --

As a former chair of the DNC, I know all too well how important our efforts are to get out the vote during off-year elections. And as the current governor of Virginia, I'm highly invested in how this year's races finish next Tuesday.

But this election season is different. All over the country, we're seeing Republicans like Ed Gillespie double down on the vile politics that have divided our country. And right now, the Virginia governor's race between Ed and Ralph Northam is as close as they come.

We need to take action, and stepping up next week is just too late.

**[Pitch in now to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot and across the nation next Tuesday.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523965/4067b0a/47d5f121f/7e66ef52/1583851500/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Pitch+in+now+to+help+elect+Democrats+up+&utm_campaign=em_20171103_tm2_nd&source=em_20171103_tm2_nd&refcode=em_20171103_tm2_nd")**

The future of our country is hanging in the balance, Derek. Here in Virginia, I've worked with bipartisan support to promote policies that move our state in the right direction:

* We've made major investments in public education that will help educate today's workforce and prepare our kids for tomorrow's jobs market.
* Our Virginia Values Veterans program has helped tens of thousands of our heroic service members make successful transitions from service to gainful employment as civilians. Virginia is home to over 725,000 veterans, and we're invested in making sure they know we appreciate their sacrifices and will always have their backs.
* We're setting hardworking families up with opportunities to succeed. Thanks to thousands of new jobs and over $18.7 billion in capital investment brought to Virginia, our unemployment rate is 3.7 percent -- well below the national rate.

I'm counting on Ralph Northam to protect the progress we've made here in Virginia.

But if we've learned anything these past nine months, it's that we must keep winning in order to protect our progress, or we risk losing it all.

Let's do everything in our power to keep Virginia blue and elect Democrats all over the country in next Tuesday's elections. Pitch in $3 or more today.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

"" Derek -- As a former chair of the DNC, I know all too well how important our efforts are to get out the vote during off-year elections. And as the current governor of Virginia, I'm highly invested in how this year's races finish next Tuesday. But this election season is different. All over the country, we're seeing Republicans like Ed Gillespie double down on the vile politics that have divided our country. And right now, the Virginia governor's race between Ed and Ralph Northam is as close as they come. We need to take action, and stepping up next week is just too late. "" The future of our country is hanging in the balance, Derek. Here in Virginia, I've worked with bipartisan support to promote policies that move our state in the right direction: We've made major investments in public education that will help educate today's workforce and prepare our kids for tomorrow's jobs market. Our Virginia Values Veterans program has helped tens of thousands of our heroic service members make successful transitions from service to gainful employment as civilians. Virginia is home to over 725,000 veterans, and we're invested in making sure they know we appreciate their sacrifices and will always have their backs. We're setting hardworking families up with opportunities to succeed. Thanks to thousands of new jobs and over $18.7 billion in capital investment brought to Virginia, our unemployment rate is 3.7 percent -- well below the national rate. I'm counting on Ralph Northam to protect the progress we've made here in Virginia. But if we've learned anything these past nine months, it's that we must keep winning in order to protect our progress, or we risk losing it all. Let's do everything in our power to keep Virginia blue and elect Democrats all over the country in next Tuesday's elections. Pitch in $3 or more today. But we will face obstacles. First, the **tax-and-spend Democrats will obstruct.** Then, their **s****pecial interest interest allies will descend**. And finally, their **legion of lobbyists will encroach**.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Take a stand with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek:

Last week, I was thrilled to cast my in-person absentee ballot for Ralph Northam and the rest of the Democratic ticket. And with the election just four days away, I'll be joining Democrats across the Commonwealth over the weekend for a major Get Out the Vote effort. **I'm doing this because I don't want to wake up on Wednesday, November 8th, and feel that there was more I could have done to make sure we win.**

**[And I know you feel the same way.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BpJLIGS7uHR0aCo5ydtk%2FQj5y7gArggy)**

In a challenging political climate, with new controversies and difficulties arriving daily, it can feel overwhelming to find the best way for each of us to contribute. (Particularly in Virginia, with our off-year elections.) I want you to know that you really do have the power to impact this election -- and those that come next: We know that talking to voters wins races, but to do that, we have to have the resources to reach as many of them as possible.

**Will you make an online contribution today? Your donation will not only support Ralph's campaign for Governor, but will also help my team prepare for a competitive race next year.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $17>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=BC%2FvtRcYJ51LwjLprz3wqAj5y7gArggy)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=TjFkPZ8sGRPWP69zypl7Fgj5y7gArggy)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=f2sYPpD9T7IEzG%2FJ44DKnAj5y7gArggy)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=CK6b1tPt%2BYOz5mJwAPxG%2Fwj5y7gArggy)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=eBMtpBqb66xlnL%2Fq1HoBqgj5y7gArggy)**
We know that Republicans want to capitalize on their 2016 successes to overturn many of our Democratic leaders -- but we also know that the majority of Virginians believe in a progressive and inclusive Commonwealth, and we're not going to let the GOP move us backward.

**Right now, I'm asking you to take a stand -- let's show Ed Gillespie, Corey Stewart, and all the right-wing extremists and special interest organizations that Democrats are not going to give up. [Pitch in today to support Ralph Northam for Governor this year and my re-election to the Senate next year.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=W84X0F1X1Cz7dpD40TEYGgj5y7gArggy)**

Thank you.

Tim Kaine
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vaDF7%2FGDOI5KANG9MeTY2Aj5y7gArggy)

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: The DNC needs to change
body:
Donna Brazile just told the world what millions of independents and progressives already suspected
#
Friends,
Former DNC interim chair Donna Brazile just told the world what millions of independents and progressives already suspected. The presidential primary was rigged as far back as 2015, as then-chair Debbie Wasserman Schultz ceded all authority to the Clinton campaign. The DNC's reliance on big money donors tipped the scales against progressives.
[**This proves why we must continue to fight against establishment politics. Make a $5 contribution to Our Revolution today so that we can stand up to the party insiders and corporate consultants.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aeb3/bed43eb/1109a7ab/75ff31db/2840962051/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-dnc?refcode=em171103-full&noskip=true")
Even after the 2016 election, the party continues to alienate progressives. Tom Perez, the current DNC Chair, just demoted supporters of Senator Bernie Sanders and Representative Keith Ellison, including Our Revolution Board Member Dr. Jim Zogby, the only Arab American, from the Executive Committee.
The DNC's preference for large campaign contributions over our revolutionary model of small-dollar donations goes against everything a grassroots organization is supposed to be about. We won't have a chance against Republican extremism if our core values are compromised for campaign contributions. Progressives, independents, and a growing number of Democrats feel that the Party no longer works for them. That has to change.
The model of relying on people, not special interests is the way forward. But that only works if you keep supporting organizations and candidates that can change the world for the better. [**Contribute $5 to Our Revolution and help us get big money out of the Democratic Party and return power to the grassroots.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aeb3/bed43eb/1109a7ab/75ff31db/2840962051/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-dnc?refcode=em171103-full&noskip=true")
Power concedes nothing without pressure. We need to apply that pressure now more than ever.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: we knew it would be disastrous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Sign the petition today. |
---

| | Peter,

Did you know that in 2014, Indiana had the lowest voter turnout in the country? With that mark of shame, you would hope that officials would work to make it easier for more people to vote.

But you'd be wrong. In fact, thanks to the Republican-held Secretary of State's office, early voting locations in more Democratic-leaning communities have been reduced drastically, while those in Republican-leaning areas have been increased year after year.

**In Indiana and across the nation, there's a real attack on the right to vote, especially in poorer neighborhoods and those predominantly made up of people of color.** Whether it's through limiting access to polling locations, or enacting strict voter ID requirements, there are continuous attempts to sabotage the right to vote. **They're not trying to win over voters who don't share their vision -- they'd rather take away their political voice.**

**[Stand with us, and demand an end to discriminatory voting practices.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2496/7377f838/35169d20/51fbae1e/2466394783/VEsH/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/ndrcvra?utm_source=donnelly&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ndrcvra")**

Peter, when the Supreme Court voted to strike down parts of the Voting Rights Act, we knew that it would be disastrous for our democracy. But we didn't know the subsequent attacks on voting rights would be this blatant, or just how catastrophic the consequences would be. **We can't let more attacks keep on coming against the right to vote -- Congress must step up to protect voters and our democracy.**

**Sign the petition the today:[http://www.grassrootsact.com/ndrcvra](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2496/7377f838/35169d20/51fbae1e/2466394783/VEsE/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/ndrcvra?utm_source=donnelly&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ndrcvra")**

\--Team Donnelly

| **Taking Indiana to the World...Bringing the World to Indiana**
* * *
Governor **Eric Holcomb** is fond of saying he wants to "take Indiana to the world, and bring the world to Indiana." And, like all the pledges he's made to Hoosiers, he's making good on this one, too! He's already made stops in London (before he was even sworn in!), Hungary, France, Japan and now India with the same goal and same mission in mind: showcasing international business and investors to everything Indiana has to offer.

And his efforts to build relationships overseas continue to pay off. Product engineering solutions provider AXISCADES, based in India, announced its intention to locate its North American headquarters in Indiana and create 500 new, high-wage jobs within the next five years this week. That's just the latest in a string of incredible economic development announcements coming as a result of the relationships built on these trips.

_**Congratulations to Rep.-elect Shane Lindauer**_
I'm starting to believe there are five seasons in Indiana: spring, summer, fall, winter and caucus season. For the second time in about a month, my team and I conducted a caucus to replace a valued member of our Indiana Republican Party team. First, it was the caucus to replace State Sen. **Luke Kenley** (State Sen. **Victoria Spartz** now occupies that seat) and this past Monday it was a caucus to replace State Rep. **Mike Braun** in House District 63. On behalf of all of us at the Indiana Republican Party, I want to congratulate State Rep.-elect **Shane Lindauer** on winning that caucus. I know he will hit the ground running. And, since it's caucus season, we'll all be in Perry County this coming Monday to run the caucus to replace State Rep. **Lloyd Arnold**. 'Tis the season!

_**The 1st Annual Team Holcomb Fall Dinner is Two Weeks Away**_
DON'T FORGET! We are exactly two weeks away from our 1st Annual Team Holcomb Fall Dinner. Join us on Friday, November 17, 2017, at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis as we celebrate America's military with special guests **Josh Bleill** and **Sammy L. Davis**. As I mentioned before, this event is taking the place of the usual Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner so that we can better utilize our unique, one-of-a-kind fundraising agreement between State Party and the Eric Holcomb for Indiana campaign to benefit candidates up and down the ballot in 2018.

If you haven't secured your ticket for this event yet, please [click here for more information](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d804f68f7&e=1acd9bb3d6).

\- Kyle Hupfer

(Photo: State Rep. **Jeff Ellington** , State Sen. **Eric Bassler** , State Rep. and Indiana Republican Party Secretary **Holli Sullivan** , State Rep.-elect **Shane Lindauer** , Chairman Hupfer and State Sen. and Dubois County Chair **Mark Messmer** at the House District 63 Caucus in Jasper Monday night.)
* * *
---
| |
---
| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| As mentioned above, this week Governor Holcomb, First Lady **Janet Holcomb,** Secretary of Commerce **Jim Schellinger** and a delegation of Hoosier leaders visited India to solidify business partnerships spurred by our recent - and continuing - economic success. Although that was the main purpose of the trip, the team also had the opportunity to take in some of India's remarkable culture and history. For instance, they were able to [tour the historic Taj Mahal](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6850cac018&e=1acd9bb3d6), [eat Indian cuisine](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=94f1363a7c&e=1acd9bb3d6), and participate in the Infosys (another company expanding operations in Indiana!) tradition of [planting a yellow trumpet tree](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=191994b8e6&e=1acd9bb3d6) at the company's Mysore campus. And, since it wasn't enough that Governor Holcomb has made a basket in all 92 Indiana counties, he kept his personal tradition alive by [shooting a few hoops](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cf72a99b38&e=1acd9bb3d6) in India. The First Lady was also busy [meeting with teachers and administrators](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e043c16adc&e=1acd9bb3d6) at Christel House Bangalore where she toured the school, [read with students](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5591c8161a&e=1acd9bb3d6) and even [met young students](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=58b961751b&e=1acd9bb3d6) who share her own passion for art!

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Taking Indiana to the World...Bringing the World to Indiana Governor Eric Holcomb is fond of saying he wants to "take Indiana to the world, and bring the world to Indiana." And, like all the pledges he's made to Hoosiers, he's making good on this one, too! He's already made stops in London (before he was even sworn in!), Hungary, France, Japan and now India with the same goal and same mission in mind: showcasing international business and investors to everything Indiana has to offer. And his efforts to build relationships overseas continue to pay off. Product engineering solutions provider AXISCADES, based in India, announced its intention to locate its North American headquarters in Indiana and create 500 new, high-wage jobs within the next five years this week. That's just the latest in a string of incredible economic development announcements coming as a result of the relationships built on these trips. Congratulations to Rep.-elect Shane Lindauer I'm starting to believe there are five seasons in Indiana: spring, summer, fall, winter and caucus season. Under the leadership of Senator Bob Giuda, we expect that ranking to improve.********So this week’s “Republican of the Week” goes to Senator Bob Giuda (R-Warren, District 2) who chaired a commission to study the processes to resolve right-to-know complaints in New Hampshire. “Studying and working to improve the state’s Right-To-Know statute is essential to providing transparency and opportunity for citizens to be part of their government,” said Giuda.********[The study commission findings report recommends the establishment of a Citizens' Right-To-Know Appeals Commission to oversee an ombudsman. ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbT0pW52ma3LTMrghVm-2FI6cX4ebvWLg2UuoF-2FEkcOutFQPT8zly08WDbSdPLarlwS1aKjiteQvLVG75jBNObePCY-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MaV316hhrgl6zQaoG3EUNutonrYLDtW3A7nVqYzR4BiW92mn3lnYFSGf3mmxL5Hzr42crRuf6lmR27LGRfz2LsyVedliNg5aaONkydw1wmu1wPCIiEfHUF56gjipCWn-2FqnnA-2F8CQo-2FrFrEPH0JkZO4Mj32kYQloqR7o2SAK4C8-2BXtQiQKxN7AA2CLIpCN6SzxTmumpbzurdNUOPT-2FbkG0qAuYjVjN-2FlB-2FPGvZ7esyTa7pHCPAWQhAiMbsCN5Yyu1XYMpbgK-2B65BzHRF1bWkBLrg-3D-3D)The report states “in lieu of filing a petition in the Superior Court under Chapter 91-A, the citizen may appeal to the Commission whose administrator will immediately refer the matter to the Ombudsman.” subject: What's in this for me?

body:
****
**** **** | |
| | **November 3, 2017**
---|---

For too long, Americans have had to put up with a broken tax system that takes too much of their time, money, and energy. It's ridiculously complicated, full of special-interest loopholes, and way too burdensome for families and small businesses. Yesterday, House Republicans took a huge step toward fixing that system. We are going to help middle-class families by doubling the standard deduction, increasing the child tax credit, and growing wages. **In short, the average family will get to keep an additional $1,182 a year in their pockets. **
| **** | **Business Insider**
---
**The GOP unveiled its massive tax plan that proposes a sweeping overhaul to the system******

_
House GOP leaders on Thursday took their biggest step yet in their attempt to overhaul the US tax code by releasing legislation that proposes sweeping changes to the current system.

"My administration will work tirelessly to make good on our promise to the working people who built our nation and deliver historic tax cuts and reforms -- the rocket fuel our economy needs to soar higher than ever before," said US President Donald Trump, who has expressed a desire to sign a bill into law by Christmas.

Kevin Brady, House Speaker Paul Ryan, and other House GOP leaders touted the bill in a press conference on Thursday and argued **it would save the average family of four $1,182 a year on their taxes**._

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MzE0MDgyNTkS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MDM4OTAyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****
| **** | **New York Post**
---
**This is the tax-cut plan America needs**********

_
House Republicans just released a tax-cut plan that meets the nation's needs -- and in a less bitterly partisan world would win major Democratic support.

**It offers the relief for business and the middle class needed to get the economy roaring** , while arguably increasing the progressivity of the individual tax code.

There are goodies for middle-income taxpayers, too. For example, the lowest bracket, with a rate of 12 percent, has an upper limit higher than the current 10 percent and 15 percent brackets. **So many middle-income taxpayers would see their rates drop**._

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MzE0MDgyNTkS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MDM4OTAyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
****
| | **Independent Journal Review**
---
**Tax Reform Brings Much-Needed Relief to Everyday Americans**
****

__
_
The plan would help relieve financial burdens on families by nearly doubling the standard deduction and increasing the child tax credit. It would cut the number of tax brackets, streamline the tax system and make it easier to file each year.

Under the president's plan, **most of us will be able to file taxes on a single page** -- a welcome change, considering the filing process eats up more than 6 billion hours of taxpayers' time each year. This plan will deliver a fairer, flatter, and simpler system that our nation's hard-working families deserve._

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MzE0MDgyNTkS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MDM4OTAyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
****
| **** | **CNBC**
---
**A GOP tax bill worth passing!******

_Other good signs for the middle class include the**doubling of the standard deduction**. Remember that's essential since about 70 percent of federal tax filers don't itemize their taxes and use that standard deduction according to the Tax Policy Center. And another good move is **increasing the child tax credit from $1,000 to $1,600** with an additional $300 credit for each parent as part of a consolidated family tax credit.

And then there's a good shot in the arm the Republicans should get on this argument from an unexpected source. Thursday's Washington Post set its fact checker Glenn Kessler on the case against Democrat Senator Kamala Harris' claim that the GOP tax plan will raise taxes for most working families. Kessler and the Post gave Harris the infamous "Four Pinocchios" for that one.___

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzE0MDgyNTkS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MDM4OTAyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
****
| **** | **Washington Post**
---
**Senate Democrats falsely claim GOP tax plan will raise taxes for most working-class families******

_
In their haste to condemn the GOP tax plan, Democrats have spread far and wide the false claim that families making less than $86,100 on average will face a hefty tax hike. Actually, it 's the opposite. **Most families in that income range would get a tax cut. **Any Democrat who spread this claim should delete their tweets and make clear they were in error.

**Four Pinocchios**_

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MzE0MDgyNTkS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MDM4OTAyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****
| **** | **BONUS: The Hill**
---
**Trump backs House GOP tax bill**

_President Trump on Thursday expressed support for the new House Republican tax bill, praising lawmakers for "another important step toward providing massive tax relief for the American people."

Trump said that while there is "much work left to do," the administration would "deliver historic tax cuts and reforms -- t**he rocket fuel our economy needs to soar higher than ever before.** "_

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MzE0MDgyNTkS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MDM4OTAyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
****
